calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Amanda L. Ebey, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Syliva Rorem, individually and as Guardian Ad Litem for Mitchell Ortega.
Ms. Rorem was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Flausino Barbosa.
Default was entered against defendant on September 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 1, 2010.
Dismissal with prejudice was filed as to defendant Poliana Junqueira on April 11, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sylvia Borem, individually and as Guardian Ad Litem for Michael Ortega, and against the Defaulted Defendant Flausino Barbosa as follows:

Damages/Principal - $11,600.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,624.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $13,224.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 4/20/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
